accident_description: Rear-ended at a stoplight. Other driver was texting.
damage_description: Significant rear bumper damage. Trunk lid bent upward. Both tail lights shattered. Exhaust pipe displaced. Paint scraped along passenger side quarter panel.

accident_location: Parking lot, Westfield Mall, 2501 Colorado Blvd, Denver CO
accident_description: Vehicle was struck while parked in a shopping mall parking lot. Returned to find driver-side door dented and mirror broken. No note left by responsible party.
damage_description: Large dent on driver-side front door. Side mirror housing cracked and mirror glass missing. Minor paint transfer on door panel.

accident_location: Intersection of Oak St and Main Ave, Portland OR
accident_description: T-bone collision at a four-way intersection. Other driver ran a red light and struck the passenger side of my vehicle.
damage_description: Severe passenger-side intrusion. Both passenger doors crushed inward. B-pillar visibly deformed. Side curtain airbags deployed. Passenger window shattered. Frame damage likely.

accident_location: Highway 101 Northbound, Mile Marker 232, San Jose CA
accident_description: Hydroplaned during heavy rain and hit the center median barrier. Vehicle spun and came to rest on the shoulder.
damage_description: Front bumper torn off. Hood crumpled. Radiator pushed back into engine bay. Both front airbags deployed. Front axle bent. Driver side fender crushed. Fluid leaking from engine compartment.

assessment.notes: Repair cost exceeds vehicle value. Structural frame damage confirmed. Vehicle declared total loss.

accident_location: Elm Street near 4th Ave, Austin TX
accident_description: Sideswiped by a delivery truck that was merging without checking blind spot. Truck driver acknowledged fault.
damage_description: Long scrape along entire driver side from front fender to rear quarter panel. Driver-side mirror knocked off. Front fender pushed in slightly.

accident_location: Garage entrance, 450 Park Ave, New York NY
accident_description: Scraped the passenger side against a concrete pillar while entering a narrow parking garage. Low speed impact.
damage_description: Deep scrape along passenger-side doors. Paint removed down to bare metal in several spots. Minor dent on rear passenger door. Side trim strip torn.

accident_location: Route 66, 12 miles east of Flagstaff AZ
accident_description: Deer jumped onto the road at dusk. Swerved to avoid but clipped the animal. Vehicle went off road into a ditch.
damage_description: Front-right fender crumpled. Headlight assembly destroyed. Right-side of bumper hanging loose. Windshield cracked from impact. Possible suspension damage on front-right. Undercarriage scraping noted.

accident_location: I-285, Northbound near exit 12, Atlanta GA
accident_description: Multi-vehicle pileup on the interstate during foggy conditions. Rear-ended by one vehicle, then pushed into the vehicle ahead.
damage_description: Front and rear bumpers crushed. Hood buckled. Trunk crumpled and unable to open. Both headlights and tail lights broken. Radiator leaking. Rear axle possibly bent. Multiple airbags deployed.

accident_location: Maple Drive and Cedar Lane, Naperville IL
accident_description: Backed out of driveway and collided with a neighbor's parked car across the street.
damage_description: Rear bumper dented and cracked on insured vehicle. Minor scratch on neighbor's front bumper. Insured vehicle reverse sensor housing broken.

assessment.notes: Minor cosmetic damage only. Bumper replacement and sensor housing repair recommended. No structural damage.

accident_location: Warehouse District, 800 Commerce St, Dallas TX
accident_description: Large piece of debris fell from an overpass construction zone onto the vehicle while driving underneath. No other vehicles involved.
damage_description: Roof severely dented with two puncture points. Windshield completely shattered. Sunroof glass broken inward. Headliner torn. A-pillar cover cracked on driver side.
